description: Southpointe Cove - Large spacious South facing 4 Beds + 3.5 Baths townhome by Westmark Development Group. Walking distance to Steveston Village, Homma Elementary and McMath Secondary. This home feature: Spacious Open-concept layout w/9ft ceilings, Gas range, Side by Side Double Garage. Three Bedrooms up & the primary bedroom offers a walk-in closet. One bedroom down with in suite bathroom provide plenty of space for family, guests or a home office. Welcome to your future home. Open house Saturday Jan 24, from 1:00 to 3:00pm.
